name: Ash Barrens
oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
Basic landcycling {1} ({1}, Discard this card: Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)
flavor_text: Many interstellar civilizations have dumped their unwanted elements on Planet Morbus, from toxins to lowlifes.

name: Command Tower
oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.
flavor_text: Back in the '80s, Channel 6 built their headquarters at the corner of Spectacle and Scandal.

name: Containment Protocol
oracle_text:
Enchant creature
When this Aura enters, tap enchanted creature.
Enchanted creature doesn't untap during its controller's untap step.
flavor_text: "What else can we do? No prison could hold Tokka, and she'll hurt someone if we let her out to play."

name: Cultivate
oracle_text: Search your library for up to two basic land cards, reveal those cards, put one onto the battlefield tapped and the other into your hand, then shuffle.
flavor_text:
"One need not always find peace on the sword's edge, my son. One can find peace as readily in helping things grow."
—Splinter

name: Evolving Wilds
oracle_text: {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
flavor_text:
"A hamster sumo wrestler? Snot that's also a crime lord? An alien newt assassin? April, how am I supposed to edit all of this footage into something watchable, much less believable?"
—Irma Langenstein

name: Foe-liage
oracle_text: Whenever a land enters during your turn, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.
flavor_text:
"Wilcox said a weed is but an unloved flower, but this is the kind of flower only his mother could love!"
—Donatello

name: Hamato Ninpō
oracle_text: Hamato Ninpō deals 4 damage to target attacking or blocking creature.
flavor_text: Strike with swiftness. Strike with purpose. Strike true.

name: Monster Mashup
oracle_text:
Reach (This creature can block creatures with flying.)
Menace (This creature can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.)
flavor_text:
"Yes! It knows how to destroy! My secret concern is, does it know how to obey?"
—Krang

name: Thriving Grove
oracle_text:
This land enters tapped. As it enters, choose a color other than green.
{T}: Add {G} or one mana of the chosen color.
flavor_text:
"Lookit 'em, Rock. So quiet and content. Dey don't even know they're in a box fer other people ta gawk at. What a buncha dopes."
—Bebop

name: Thriving Isle
oracle_text:
This land enters tapped. As it enters, choose a color other than blue.
{T}: Add {U} or one mana of the chosen color.
flavor_text:
"My preservation was a spectacle. Artificial empathy to salve the crushing despair of modern human society. Fool's compassion."
—Ray Fillet

name: Thriving Moor
oracle_text:
This land enters tapped. As it enters, choose a color other than black.
{T}: Add {B} or one mana of the chosen color.
flavor_text:
"Not remember good, papa, but . . . miss home. Miss friend."
—Tokka

name: Ticked Off
oracle_text: Target creature gains double strike until end of turn. (It deals both first-strike and regular combat damage.)

name: Triceraton Regenta
oracle_text:
Vigilance (Attacking doesn't cause this creature to tap.)
Whenever this creature attacks, untap up to one other target creature.
flavor_text:
"I am meant to be the Triceraton Regenta, so I must fulfill my destiny and avenge my mother's death!"
—Seri

name: Utrom Monitor
oracle_text:

Flying (This creature can't be blocked except by creatures with flying or reach.)
flavor_text: The utrom are a peace-minded people, up to a point. Beyond that, they are a laser-minded people.

name: Vibrant Cityscape
oracle_text: {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
flavor_text:
"Where do you want to go? Jungle level? Ice level? Lava level? They have all the classics!"
